subtitle.en: non-ionic micro-particles dissolve into polyester chains only above ~130 °C; below the glass-transition the dye sits on the surface and rinses away
subtitle.ko: 비이온성 미세 입자가 ~130 °C 이상에서만 폴리에스터에 용해 — Tg 이하에선 표면에만 남아 씻겨 나감

description.en: PET fibre cross-section + dye particles. Drag T from 40 to 160 °C; particles penetrate inward as polymer softens. Sigmoid uptake curve marks Tg=80°C and commercial T=130°C.
description.ko: PET 단면 + 염료 입자. T를 40~160°C 드래그; 폴리머 연화에 따라 입자 침투. Sigmoid uptake 곡선이 Tg=80°C와 상용 130°C 표시.
